name: example
description: Example pipeline - simulated CI workflow with looped logs and delays

steps.name: clone
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "for ($i=1; $i -le 5; $i++) { Write-Output ('[checkout] preparing sources chunk ' + $i); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }"

steps.name: pull
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "for ($i=1; $i -le 4; $i++) { Write-Output ('[pull] syncing branch update ' + $i); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }"

steps.name: run
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "for ($i=1; $i -le 5; $i++) { Write-Output ('[run] executing runtime task ' + $i); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }"

steps.name: publish
steps.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "for ($i=1; $i -le 3; $i++) { Write-Output ('[publish] shipping artifact batch ' + $i); Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }"
